title: Planner Mermaid Visualization Requirement
description: Validates that Planner includes Mermaid architecture diagrams for plans with 3+ phases

inputs.label: 3-phase-plan-requires-diagrams
inputs.description: A plan with 3 phases must include at least one Mermaid diagram (phase dependency DAG)

input.task_description: Implement a 3-phase feature with independent research, implementation, and documentation phases
constraints: Must produce Mermaid visualizations per plan quality standards

inputs.label: 2-phase-plan-diagrams-optional
inputs.description: A plan with fewer than 3 phases does not require Mermaid diagrams

input.task_description: Simple 2-phase bug fix with test addition and implementation

inputs.label: complex-plan-multiple-diagrams
inputs.description: A complex plan should include both dependency DAG and sequence/state diagram

input.task_description: Implement a 6-phase migration with 3 waves, inter-phase contracts, and state machine logic

assertions: Plans with 3+ phases include a diagrams array with at least one entry
At least one diagram has type 'flowchart' (phase dependency DAG)
Each diagram has non-empty title and mermaid_source fields
Diagram mermaid_source is valid Mermaid syntax
Plans with fewer than 3 phases may omit diagrams
